name: Pinapple Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cut each squash in half and scoop out the seeds and pulp. If necessary, trim the tip off the bottom of each squash cup so that it stands upright.
3. Fill each squash cup with 1/4 cup pineapple, 1/4 teaspoon margarine, and a sprinkle of cinnamon.
4. Place the squash cups in a flat baking dish and pour hot water around the bottoms to a depth of about 1/2 inch.
5. Cover the pan tightly with foil.
6. Bake for 1 hour or until the squash is tender and can be easily pierced with a fork.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE
Low-sodium diets: This recipe is excellent. CAL: 148; CHO: 34g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 2g; SOD: 31mg; CHO: 0g
